title: Notifications - Onboarding - Don't Allow, dialog - Cancel then Go to Settings
scenario: Notifications toggle in App Settings shows OS settings dialog when notifications were initially denied during onboarding
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app and begin onboarding.
2. When prompted for notification permissions, select "Don't Allow".
3. Complete onboarding and reach the Home screen.
4. Navigate to App Settings → General → Notifications.
5. Tap the toggle to turn Notifications ON.
8. Tap the toggle again to turn Notifications ON.
9. Tap Go to Settings on the dialog.
expected: After tapping Cancel, the user is returned to the Notifications tab with the toggle remaining OFF. After tapping Go to Settings, the OS notification settings for the app should open.
